name: tattoo-foundation-carrier-intelligence-mcp
description: Public Model Context Protocol server published by the TATTOO Foundation (501(c)(3) survivor-founded driver-protection nonprofit, EIN 33-2580477). Provides US commercial trucking carrier intelligence — FMCSA SAFER census, authority history, insurance filings, crash records, roadside inspections, computed BASIC safety scores, H-2B trucking labor applications. Dataset built by Carso Cybernetics on the SuperTrucker platform; query access donated to the Foundation, which serves it publicly here.

dataset_origin.license: Donated query access to the TATTOO Foundation for public, driver-protective service.

tools.name: lookup_carrier
tools.description: Verify a US commercial trucking carrier by USDOT number or legal/DBA name.

tools.name: carrier_revocation_history
tools.description: Full authority-history timeline (revocations, grants, suspensions, transfers) for a carrier.

tools.name: carrier_insurance_status
tools.description: FMCSA insurance filings — active 91X auto liability and other types — for a carrier.

tools.name: h2b_trucking_employers
tools.description: DOL H-2B labor disclosure data filtered to trucking SOC codes (53-30xx).

tools.name: carrier_safety_history
tools.description: Crash record and roadside inspection history — fatalities, injuries, OOS rates vs national averages, violations by BASIC category.

tools.name: carrier_safety_scores
tools.description: Computed BASIC safety percentiles (FMCSA SMS-style, six categories) with intervention-threshold breach flags.

notes: Server is deployed and operational. The TATTOO Foundation is the public publisher of this MCP — it gives the Foundation the trust and reputation that come from serving authoritative organic carrier intelligence to agentic clients. Dataset is shared with SuperTrucker (the same data also powers the SuperTrucker product at data.supertrucker.ai).
